name: Nevasa Hmc Sa Administradora General De Fondos - Nevasa Deuda Privada Fund
summary: Nevasa Hmc Sa Administradora General De Fondos - Nevasa Deuda Privada Fund invests in private debt. Nevasa Hmc Sa Administradora General De Fondos manages the fund. The fund aims to generate returns through investments in privately placed debt instruments.
